short_blurb: Roofing repairs and replacement for Carson homes and commercial buildings.
local_note: Carson is a large South Bay city with significant residential neighborhoods and major commercial and industrial zones near the 405 and 110 freeways. Residential roofs in Carson tend to be flat or low-slope due to the area's housing styles, and many have aging modified bitumen or built-up roofs that need replacement. We replace these cleanly with modern TPO or modified bitumen systems with full manufacturer warranties.

faqs.q: What's the best flat roof replacement option for my Carson home?
faqs.a: For residential flat roofs in Carson, we most commonly install TPO (heat-welded seams, 20-year warranty) or peel-and-stick modified bitumen. We'll give you a comparison with pros and cons for your specific situation.
